pokemon:yveltal.name: Yveltal
pokemon:yveltal.summary: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.
When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.
When this legendary Pokémon’s wings and tail feathers spread wide and glow red, it absorbs the life force of living creatures.
When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.
